arguments.oldString:
private static void writeCSV(List<BenchmarkResult> results) throws IOException {
        new File("output").mkdirs();
        try (PrintWriter writer = new PrintWriter(new FileWriter("output/timeA.csv"))) {
            writer.println("Collection,Operation,1K,10K,100K,1M,10M,1K-10K_Ratio,10K-100K_Ratio,100K-1M_Ratio,1M-10M_Ratio,1K-10K_BigO,10K-100K_BigO,100K-1M_BigO,1M-10M_BigO");
            
            for (BenchmarkResult result : results) {
                writer.printf("%s,%s,%d,%d,%d,%d,%d,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%.2f,%s,%s,%s,%s\n",
                    result.structure,
                    result.operation,
                    result.nanoPerOp[0],
                    result.nanoPerOp[1],
                    result.nanoPerOp[2],
                    result.nanoPerOp[3],
                    result.nanoPerOp[4],
                    result.ratios[0],
                    result.ratios[1],
                    result.ratios[2],
                    result.ratios[3],
                    result.bigOs[0],
                    result.bigOs[1],
                    result.bigOs[2],
                    result.bigOs[3]);
